hero.label: AI-POWERED SALES OUTREACH PLATFORM
hero.title: Send. Follow Up. Close.
hero.subtitle: Reachquix is the all-in-one outreach platform that sends your cold emails across 50+ countries, follows up at exactly the right time, detects every reply instantly, and manages your leads in a built-in CRM — so you can stop chasing and start closing.
hero.trustLine: ✓ Zero setup fees  ✓ Live in 5 minutes  ✓ No contracts ever
hero.euRegistered: Registered in the Republic of Estonia, European Union

logoBar.trusted: Trusted by 2,500+ businesses in 50+ countries already using Reachquix

platform.label: THE REACHQUIX PLATFORM
platform.title: One platform. Every tool you need to grow faster.
platform.subtitle: Stop paying for 5 different tools that do not talk to each other. Reachquix replaces your email tool, your CRM, your spreadsheet tracker, and your follow-up reminders — in one clean, simple dashboard built for the way real businesses work.
platform.emailDesc: Send thousands of personalized cold emails automatically. Your sequences run 24/7 — reaching more prospects while you sleep, follow up at the perfect moment, and never miss a potential client again.
platform.crmDesc: Every lead, every conversation, every deal — organized in one place. Track your entire pipeline from first email to signed contract without ever switching apps or losing track of who said what.
platform.sheetsDesc: Reach prospects in their own language. Reachquix AI writes outreach emails in English, Arabic, Spanish, French, German, Dutch and more — run campaigns in multiple languages simultaneously from one dashboard, for any market in the world.

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.title: From cold contact to closed deal — in 4 simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: No technical skills required. No complicated setup. Just connect, write, launch, and close.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Connect your Google Sheet in seconds. Reachquix reads your contact names, email addresses, and any custom columns automatically. Add thousands of contacts at once — your list is live and ready instantly. No CSV. No copy-paste. No headaches.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Write your initial email and follow-ups using our AI-powered template editor. Set the perfect send timing — Day 2, Day 4, Day 7, and beyond. Personalize every message automatically with {{FirstName}}, {{Company}}, and custom variables that make every email feel hand-written.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Hit send once and Reachquix takes over completely. Emails go out on schedule. Follow-ups fire automatically. Replies are detected in real time. Sequences pause the moment someone responds. Your Google Sheet updates itself. You do nothing — except watch the replies come in.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Every reply lands directly in your built-in CRM with the full conversation attached. Move leads through your pipeline, add notes, set follow-up reminders, assign to team members, and close deals — all without ever leaving Reachquix.
howItWorks.bottomCta: I'm Ready — Start My Free Account →

emailFeatures.label: EMAIL AUTOMATION
emailFeatures.title: Outreach that works while you sleep
emailFeatures.subtitle: Set up your sequences once. Reachquix runs your entire outreach operation on autopilot — 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year. No babysitting required.
emailFeatures.f1Desc: Send up to 10 perfectly timed follow-up emails to every contact. Each email only sends if the contact has not replied yet — so you never look desperate, never double-email anyone, and always follow up at exactly the right moment.
emailFeatures.f2Desc: Reachquix monitors your inbox every 15 minutes, around the clock. The moment a contact replies, their sequence stops immediately, they are flagged as a hot lead in your CRM, and you receive an instant notification. No one slips through the cracks.
emailFeatures.f3Desc: Unlike every other tool, Reachquix lets you use your own private mail server — Namecheap, cPanel, or any SMTP provider. Keep your domain reputation strong, avoid shared blacklists, and never pay extra sending fees again.
emailFeatures.f4Desc: Staring at a blank screen? Our built-in AI writes proven, high-converting cold email sequences for your specific industry in seconds. Real estate, agencies, B2B, retail, consulting — just tell it your goal and it writes the emails.
emailFeatures.f5Desc: Send to 10,000 people and make every single one feel personally written. Insert {{FirstName}}, {{Company}}, {{City}}, {{JobTitle}} and your own custom variables automatically. Mass outreach that feels like a one-on-one message.
emailFeatures.f6Desc: Bounced addresses are caught, flagged, and removed from active sequences automatically. Every email includes a legally required one-click unsubscribe link. Your domain stays healthy, your reputation stays clean, and you stay compliant.

crmFeatures.label: BUILT-IN CRM
crmFeatures.title: Stop losing leads. Start closing deals.
crmFeatures.subtitle: Most businesses lose 40% of their leads simply by not following up properly. Reachquix gives you a full CRM purpose-built for outreach — so every lead is tracked, every deal is moving, and nothing falls through the cracks.
crmFeatures.cta: See Every Lead. Close Every Deal. →
crmFeatures.f1Desc: Every lead lives in one organized place. See the complete history — every email sent, every reply received, every note added, every call logged. No more digging through inboxes or spreadsheets trying to remember where you left off.
crmFeatures.f2Desc: See your entire sales funnel at a glance. Drag deals from New Lead → Contacted → Replied → Meeting Booked → Proposal Sent → Closed. Know exactly where every opportunity stands and what needs attention right now.
crmFeatures.f3Desc: Never forget a follow-up again. Set tasks, schedule call reminders, and get notified exactly when it is time to reach out. Your entire to-do list lives inside your CRM — in the same place your leads live.
crmFeatures.f4Desc: Beautiful real-time reports showing exactly how your outreach is performing. Emails sent, open rates, reply rates, deals closed, revenue generated. One-click reports you can send directly to clients — looking professional has never been easier.
crmFeatures.f5Desc: Add your team, assign leads, leave internal notes, and see exactly who is working on what. No more confusion about which team member is handling which client. Everyone stays aligned, nothing gets duplicated.
crmFeatures.f6Desc: When a contact replies to your campaign, they appear in your CRM automatically — with their full email thread already attached, their sequence status updated, and their contact details filled in. You close deals. We do the admin.

aiFeatures.label: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
aiFeatures.title: Not just automation. Actual intelligence.
aiFeatures.subtitle: Reachquix uses AI at every step of your global outreach — writing emails, analyzing replies, optimizing send times, checking spam scores, and enriching leads — in any language, for any market.
aiFeatures.f1Desc: When any contact anywhere replies, AI reads it instantly. Classifies as Interested, Not Interested, or Out of Office. Gives sentiment score. Drafts the perfect response for you to send with one click.
aiFeatures.f2Desc: Generate a unique personalized opening line for every single contact based on their company, industry, and location. Make 10,000 emails feel hand-written. Increases reply rates by up to 3x.
aiFeatures.f3Desc: Before sending to thousands of contacts, AI scans your email, scores it out of 100, highlights spam trigger words in red, and gives specific fixes to maximize inbox placement globally.
aiFeatures.f4Desc: AI analyzes when each contact opens emails and schedules your sends at the optimal time in their timezone. Global precision — zero guesswork.
aiFeatures.f5Desc: Describe your target audience and goal in plain English. AI builds your entire multi-step sequence — subject lines, body copy, follow-ups — in any language, in seconds.
aiFeatures.f6Desc: Paste a company name. AI fills in job title, company size, industry, location, and key pain points in seconds. Save hours of research before reaching out to any prospect in any country.

whyReachquix.label: WHY REACHQUIX
whyReachquix.title: Built different. Built for you.
whyReachquix.subtitle: Every other email tool was built by Americans, for Americans, priced for Silicon Valley. We built Reachquix for businesses in the UAE, MENA, and the Gulf — where deals are bigger, relationships matter more, and nobody has time to learn complicated software.
whyReachquix.comparisonIntro: See exactly what you get with Reachquix vs the competition:
whyReachquix.card1Desc: Every other tool in the world makes you export a spreadsheet, clean it up, save it as CSV, upload it, wait for it to process — then do it all again next week. Reachquix connects directly to your live Google Sheet. Your contacts are always up to date, always in sync, and you never touch a CSV file again.
whyReachquix.card2Desc: Right now you are probably paying for a separate email tool ($39+), a CRM ($50+), a scheduling tool ($15+), and a reporting tool ($20+). That is $124/month for four disconnected tools. Reachquix gives you all of it in one dashboard, for one flat price, with one login. The math is simple.
whyReachquix.card3Desc: Reachquix OÜ is registered in the Republic of Estonia, European Union — giving every client from New York to Singapore the security, GDPR compliance, and international credibility of a fully regulated European company.

pricing.label: SIMPLE, HONEST PRICING
pricing.title: Everything included. One price. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: No per-user fees. No add-ons. No credits. No overage charges. Pick your plan and get every feature — from day one.
pricing.notSure: Still deciding? Chat with Eva — she knows everything about our plans.
pricing.starterSub: Perfect for solo founders, freelancers and real estate agents ready to automate their outreach.
pricing.growthSub: For growing agencies and sales teams that need more power and no limits.
pricing.agencySub: For agencies managing outreach for multiple clients who need full control and white-label options.
pricing.growthNote: 14-day free trial — no credit card needed
pricing.growthF5: AI Reply Analyzer — know if a lead is hot instantly
pricing.growthF6: AI Icebreaker Generator — personalized first lines at scale
pricing.growthF7: AI Sequence Builder — describe your goal, AI builds the sequence
pricing.agencyF4: Arabic AI Email Writer — Gulf business culture built in
pricing.agencyF5: AI Send Time Optimizer — send at the perfect time for each contact

testimonials.label: LOVED BY BUSINESSES ACROSS THE GULF
testimonials.title: Real businesses. Real results.
testimonials.t1Quote: We were manually chasing 500 leads every single week. It was exhausting and nothing was getting done consistently. Reachquix automated everything overnight. Our reply rate tripled in the first 30 days and we saved 20+ hours every week.
testimonials.t2Quote: As a marketing agency, we needed a tool that actually understood the Gulf market. Arabic templates, Google Sheets sync, proper CRM — all in one affordable platform. Nothing else comes close at this price point. We moved all our clients to Reachquix.
testimonials.t3Quote: We burned three months and a lot of money trying Instantly then Smartlead. Both too complex. Both too expensive. Reachquix was running in 20 minutes flat and our whole sales team actually uses it — which was never the case with the other tools.

trust.label: BUILT WITH TRUST
trust.title: Enterprise-grade security. Startup-friendly price.
trust.cta: Your Data. Your Server. Your Rules. Start Free →
trust.c1Desc: Reachquix is proudly registered as Reachquix OÜ in the Republic of Estonia, European Union. You get the legal security, data protection, and international credibility of a fully regulated European company — at a price made for real businesses.
trust.c2Desc: We never permanently store your contacts on our servers. Your data lives in YOUR Google Sheet, in YOUR account, under YOUR control. We only read it when you tell us to. Your leads are yours — always.
trust.c3Desc: We never put your emails on a shared sending IP that can get blacklisted overnight. Every email goes through YOUR private mail server — so your domain reputation is protected, your deliverability stays high, and your sender score is never at the mercy of someone else.
trust.c4Desc: Your campaigns never sleep and neither does Reachquix. Built on enterprise-grade infrastructure with automatic failover. Whether it is 3am Friday or 8am Monday — your sequences are running, your replies are being detected, and your leads are being managed.

finalCta.title: Your next client is already in your contact list. Go get them.
finalCta.subtitle: Stop leaving money on the table. Reachquix turns your cold contacts into warm conversations — automatically, every single day, while you sleep.
finalCta.note: ✓ No credit card  ✓ Live in 5 minutes  ✓ Cancel with one click  🇪🇪 EU Registered & GDPR Compliant

pricingPage.title: Simple pricing. No surprises.
pricingPage.subtitle: Start free. Scale as you grow. Cancel anytime.
pricingPage.faq1A: Yes — our Growth plan comes with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required. You can explore all features before committing.
pricingPage.faq2Q: Can I change my plan later?
pricingPage.faq2A: Absolutely. Upgrade or downgrade anytime from your dashboard. Changes take effect immediately.
pricingPage.faq3Q: What payment methods do you accept?
pricingPage.faq3A: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and PayPal through our secure payment partner Paddle.
pricingPage.faq4A: Yes. Your contact data lives in your Google Sheet under your control. We never permanently store your contacts on our servers.
pricingPage.faq5A: Yes — we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. No questions asked.
pricingPage.faq6Q: What happens when I hit my contact limit?
pricingPage.faq6A: We will notify you when you are approaching your limit. You can upgrade your plan at any time to increase your limits.
pricingPage.faq7A: Yes. Reachquix OÜ is registered in Estonia, EU. We are fully GDPR compliant. Every email includes an unsubscribe link. We never email contacts without permission.
pricingPage.stillQuestions: Still have questions? Talk to our team.

about.label: ABOUT US
about.title: Built by people who understand your market.
about.subtitle: We are not a Silicon Valley startup. We are a team based in Dubai, UAE — and we built Reachquix because we could not find a single outreach tool that actually worked for the Gulf market.
about.missionText: To give every business in the UAE and MENA region — from solo real estate agents to full-scale agencies — access to the same powerful outreach tools that Fortune 500 companies use. Without the Fortune 500 price tag.
about.v1Desc: Every feature we build starts with a real customer need. We listen to businesses in the Gulf and build exactly what they ask for.
about.v2Desc: If our software needs a manual, we have failed. Reachquix is designed to be used by anyone — from first-time entrepreneurs to seasoned sales teams.
about.v3Desc: Arabic support, local market understanding, real estate focus, WhatsApp integration — we build for how business actually works in the UAE and MENA.
about.v4Desc: EU registered company. GDPR compliant. Your data stays yours. No hidden fees. No surprise charges. What you see is what you get.
about.team1Desc: Based in Dubai. Background in AI marketing and sales automation. Built Reachquix to solve problems he experienced firsthand.
about.team2Desc: A distributed team of engineers building the platform with enterprise-grade reliability and startup-speed agility.
about.team3Desc: Based in Dubai, available to help customers get the most out of Reachquix every single day.
about.euDesc: Reachquix OÜ is proudly registered in the Republic of Estonia, European Union — giving you the security and credibility of a fully regulated European company.
about.euLocation: Operations: Dubai, UAE · Registered Office: Tallinn, Estonia
about.getStarted: Be Part of the Story — Start Free →
